changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pg_constraint c WHERE c.conname = 'chk_page_type' AND pg_get_constraintdef(c.oid) LIKE '%VIRUS_CULTURE_WORKFLOW%'

changeSet.comment: Update CHECK constraint to add VIRUS_CULTURE_WORKFLOW for virology workflow pages.

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Create Virology and Vaccine Unit notebook template

column.name: title
column.value: Virology and Vaccine Unit

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete virology and vaccine production workflow from sample intake through virus culture to vaccine development

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Virology and Vaccine Production Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Virology and Vaccine Unit notebook template with 6 predefined workflow pages: Sample Intake and Registration, Media Preparation, Cell Culture, Quality Control, Virus Culture, and Dark Room Imaging.

delete.where: title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Intake and Registration page for Virology notebook (Stage 1)

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Intake and Registration

column.name: instructions
column.value: Sample Arrival: Receive pre-labeled or labeled samples (clinical specimens or research samples). Registration: Enter metadata (Sample ID, Source, Type, Date/time), assign test type (Viral or Bacterial testing), link to project/study if applicable.

column.name: content
column.value: Stage 1: Sample Intake and Registration - Sample arrival verification and metadata entry

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Media Preparation page for Virology notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Media Preparation

column.name: instructions
column.value: Log materials used in media preparation with full traceability. Select media, reagents (with lot numbers and expiry dates), and equipment. Record sterilization parameters (temperature, time, pressure).

column.name: content
column.value: Media Preparation - Material logging and sterilization tracking

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Cell Culture page for Virology notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Cell Culture

column.name: instructions
column.value: Grow host cells where the virus will be propagated. Track cell line (e.g., Vero, MDCK), passage number, and growth conditions (temperature, CO₂ percentage, humidity). Record seeding density, flask type, and media volume.

column.name: content
column.value: Cell Culture - Host cell growth and tracking

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Quality Control page for Virology notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Quality Control

column.name: instructions
column.value: Validate cell viability and sterility. Log QC results including viability percentage (0-100%), sterility result (Pass/Fail), test method, acceptance criteria, and any deviation notes.

column.name: content
column.value: Quality Control - Cell viability and sterility validation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Virus Culture page for Virology notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Virus Culture

column.name: instructions
column.value: Inoculate cells with virus. Record virus strain, culture conditions (temperature, CO₂ percentage, duration), and any observations during the culture period.

column.name: content
column.value: Virus Culture - Virus inoculation and culture condition tracking

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Page 6: Dark Room Imaging for Virology template

column.name: title
column.value: Dark Room Imaging

column.name: instructions
column.value: Perform imaging or fluorescence analysis on virus culture samples. Store image data (Image ID), record CPE (Cytopathic Effect) observations, measure fluorescence intensity, and document any relevant observations.

column.name: content
column.value: Dark Room Imaging - Capture image data and fluorescence analysis results

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Page 7: Formulation for Virology template

column.name: instructions
column.value: Prepare viral product while recording formulation details. Document stabilizers, preservatives, virus concentration, buffer composition, batch number, and formulation notes for traceability.

column.name: content
column.value: Formulation - Prepare viral product and document formulation details

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7
